mapper.sql: SELECT user_id, DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') AS day FROM sentence_corrections UNION ALL SELECT c.user_id, DATE(m.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') AS day FROM messages m JOIN conversations c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE m.role = 'USER' UNION ALL SELECT user_id, DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') AS day FROM vocab_cards UNION ALL SELECT user_id, DATE(last_reviewed_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') AS day FROM vocab_cards WHERE last_reviewed_at IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT user_id, DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') AS day FROM listening_attempts
mapper.select: SELECT "userId", "dueCount" FROM ( SELECT u.id AS "userId", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vocab_cards v WHERE v.user_id = u.id AND v.next_review_date <= ) AS "dueCount" FROM users u WHERE COALESCE(u.study_reminders_enabled, true) = true AND (u.reviews_due_pushed_on IS NULL OR u.reviews_due_pushed_on < ) AND >= make_time(COALESCE(u.study_reminder_hour, 20), 0, 0) ) s WHERE "dueCount" > 0
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET reviews_due_pushed_on = WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
WITH act AS (
) SELECT u.id AS "userId", 0 AS "dueCount" FROM users u WHERE COALESCE(u.study_reminders_enabled, true) = true AND (u.streak_saver_pushed_on IS NULL OR u.streak_saver_pushed_on < ) AND >= make_time(21, 0, 0) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM act a WHERE a.user_id = u.id AND a.day = ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM act a WHERE a.user_id = u.id AND a.day = - 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET streak_saver_pushed_on = WHERE id = #{userId}
